fields.name: Period Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the period shown in the line.

fields.name: Period Start
fields.tooltip: Specifies the start date of the period defined on the line for the service trend.

fields.name: Prepaid Income
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total income (in LCY) that has been posted to the prepaid account with regard to the service item in the periods specified in the Period Start field.

fields.name: Posted Income
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total income (in LCY) that has been posted to the general ledger for the service item in the periods specified in the Period Start field.

fields.name: Parts Used
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of resources used in the specified period.

fields.name: Resources Used
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of spare parts used in the period shown in the Period Start field.

fields.name: Cost Used
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount of service usage based on service cost for this service item.

fields.name: Profit
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profit (posted income minus posted cost in LCY) for the service item in the period specified in the Period Start field.

fields.name: Profit %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the profit percentage for the service item in the specified period.
